name: Black Galgomon

signature_move.name: Gatling Arm
signature_move.description: Randomly fires the vulcans on both of its arms.

description: A species of Galgomon , its specialty is ambushing the enemy in the dark. It excels more than a normal Galgomon in terms of tactics and combat strength due to the effects of the " Black Digitron " mixed into its body, and primarily specializes in taijutsu . Its Special Moves are " Gatling Arm ", in which it randomly fires the vulcan s on both of its arms, and the intense exploding uppercut " Dumdum Upper ".
